sentences.target: On visite une belle demeure aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: On visite une belle demeure aujourd'hui.
translations.en: We're visiting a beautiful home today.
translations.de: Wir besichtigen heute ein schönes Haus.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天要参观一座美丽的房子。
translations.yue: 我哋今日去參觀一間靚屋。
translations.pt: Hoje vamos visitar uma bela casa.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi đi xem một ngôi nhà đẹp.
translations.nl: We bezichtigen vandaag een mooi huis.
translations.hu: Ma egy szép házat nézünk meg.
translations.hi: आज हम एक सुंदर घर देखने जा रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I dag skal vi se på et vakkert hus.
translations.id: Hari ini kami mengunjungi sebuah rumah yang indah.
translations.sv: I dag ska vi titta på ett vackert hus.
translations.da: I dag skal vi se på et smukt hus.
translations.ja: 今日は美しい家を見学します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; often translates as generic 'one' or colloquial 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular, agreeing with 'on'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun 'demeure'.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular, placed before and modifying 'demeure'.
Common noun, feminine; head of the NP functioning as the direct object of 'visite'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates the action occurs on the current day.

sentences.target: C'est une ancienne demeure près du parc.
sentences.reading: /sɛt yn ɑ̃sjɛn dəmœʁ pʁɛ dy paʁk/

translations.fr: C'est une ancienne demeure près du parc.
translations.ipa: /sɛt yn ɑ̃sjɛn dəmœʁ pʁɛ dy paʁk/
translations.en: It's an old residence near the park.
translations.es: Es una casa antigua cerca del parque.
translations.de: Es ist ein altes Anwesen in der Nähe des Parks.
translations.it: È un'antica dimora vicino al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 那是一座靠近公园的老宅。
translations.yue: 呢個係喺公園附近嘅一間舊屋。
translations.pt: É uma casa antiga perto do parque.
translations.tr: Bu, parkın yakınında eski bir ev.
translations.vi: Đó là một ngôi nhà cổ gần công viên.
translations.nl: Het is een oud huis vlak bij het park.
translations.hu: Ez egy régi ház a park közelében.
translations.hi: यह पार्क के पास एक पुराना घर है.
translations.pl: To jest stary dom niedaleko parku.
translations.el: Είναι ένα παλιό σπίτι κοντά στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Det er et gammelt hus nær parken.
translations.id: Itu adalah sebuah rumah tua dekat taman.
translations.sv: Det är ett gammalt hus nära parken.
translations.ro: Este o casă veche lângă parc.
translations.cs: Je to starý dům poblíž parku.
translations.da: Det er et gammelt hus nær parken.
translations.fi: Se on vanha talo puiston lähellä.
translations.ja: それは公園の近くにある古い家です。

tokens.explanation: Clitic demonstrative pronoun serving as the subject in a copular construction.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject 'C'' to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun 'demeure'.
Adjective, feminine singular, placed before the noun; can mean 'old' or 'former', modifying 'demeure'.
Common noun serving as the predicate nominal of the copular clause.
Adverb forming the complex preposition 'près de' to indicate proximity.
Contracted preposition ('de' + 'le') introducing the complement 'parc'.
Common noun, object of the preposition phrase indicating location.

sentences.target: Leur demeure donne sur la mer.

translations.fr: Leur demeure donne sur la mer.
translations.en: Their home looks out over the sea.
translations.de: Ihr Haus blickt auf das Meer.
translations.it: La loro casa si affaccia sul mare.
translations.pt: A casa deles dá para o mar.
translations.vi: Ngôi nhà của họ nhìn ra biển.
translations.nl: Hun huis kijkt uit over zee.
translations.hi: उनका घर समुद्र की ओर है.
translations.el: Το σπίτι τους βλέπει στη θάλασσα.
translations.cs: Jejich dům má výhled na moře.
translations.da: Deres hus vender ud mod havet.
translations.ja: 彼らの家は海に面しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'demeure'.
Common noun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; in the expression 'donner sur' meaning 'to look out onto'.
Preposition selecting the complement 'la mer' within the fixed expression 'donner sur'.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'mer'.
Common noun, object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Je rêve d'une petite demeure tranquille.

translations.fr: Je rêve d'une petite demeure tranquille.
translations.en: I dream of a small, peaceful home.
translations.de: Ich träume von einem kleinen, ruhigen Zuhause.
translations.zh-Hans: 我梦想有一个小而安静的家。
translations.yue: 我夢想有間細細嘅寧靜屋企。
translations.ru: Я мечтаю о маленьком тихом доме.
translations.pt: Eu sonho com uma casinha tranquila.
translations.he: אני חולם על בית קטן ושקט.
translations.tr: Küçük ve huzurlu bir ev hayal ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi mơ về một ngôi nhà nhỏ yên bình.
translations.nl: Ik droom van een klein, rustig huis.
translations.uk: Я мрію про маленький спокійний дім.
translations.hi: मैं एक छोटे, शांत घर का सपना देखता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg drømmer om et lite og fredelig hjem.
translations.id: Aku bermimpi tentang sebuah rumah kecil yang tenang.
translations.sv: Jag drömmer om ett litet, fridfullt hem.
translations.ro: Visez la o casă mică și liniștită.
translations.da: Jeg drømmer om et lille og fredeligt hjem.
translations.ja: 私は小さくて静かな家を夢見ています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular.
Preposition 'de' elided before a vowel; introduces the complement NP.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing 'demeure'.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular, placed before and modifying 'demeure'.
Common noun; head of the NP that is the complement of the preposition 'de'.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular, placed after the noun, further qualifying 'demeure'.
